title: File visibility in the board and inside the comment section

posts.author: LiorSt (Lior Stein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
When we upload a file, there is no visibility change, So other users have no way of knowing if there is a file they can use or the file they were looking for.
If you can add a number \ comment \ color when a file is added, that will be great.
Thank you
